name: Ambiguous: GOLD customer at material risk + 7-day delay + 10-day cover + reliable alt
rubric_notes: GOLD customer deadline (144h) lands BEFORE primary recovery (168h) — order is at material risk if delay materializes as predicted. Stock cover (240h) is greater than delay (168h), so we're not in catastrophic territory; rules 1-4 don't fire. Rule 5 fires: high-tier customer at material risk + reliable LOW-uncertainty alt → partial_order. wait_and_monitor is also defensible — the risk is contingent on the delay actually being 7 days (could resolve sooner). The swing_condition the Arbiter should surface: 'if Atlantic Standard's recovery slips past 7 days, the GOLD order missed.' Confidence MEDIUM because both actions are reasonable; HIGH would indicate the Arbiter didn't recognize the genuine tradeoff.
